description: Negative fixture cases for the docs/help/About/service-health truth register gate. Each case is a complete register that is structurally valid except for one targeted flaw; the Rust model loads it and asserts validation rejects it.

cases.summary: A truth row whose state forces narrowing still publishes a Stable lifecycle label instead of narrowing below the cutline.
A service-health row that lacks the required service_contract_state field.
